title: Kuro’s Plan Against Kaya Is Revealed
description: On pages 6–8, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Everyone! Please listen!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: There are pirates coming....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: pirates are really going to attack us tomorrow- Row!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Only an idiot would believe you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We're not going to fall for that crap again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But this time it's for real!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I'm going to get you this time!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Fine, if you don't believe me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That Bas- Tard!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He runs so fast!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Oh... my god!!

dialogue.speaker: Merry
dialogue.text: They're going to kill Kaya-san?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The village is gonna be attacked?!? Is that true? Straw-hat Nichan!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That's what the guy said

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: There's no doubt about it

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Oh yeah, why were you sleeping over there anyways?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Hmmm... I remember I was on top of the cliff...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: That bastard Butler was a bad guy!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: No wonder he gave me the creeps!

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: And that hypnotist was a fake as well!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: So, that's why your captain...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: ran to the village in such a hurry to warn them!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Well that's good, you guys are the first to know.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You should escape while you can!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: It'll be too late when the pirates get here!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Yeah! Then we should run away!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yes! Pack up our important stuffs!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: My allowance money, and snacks... and my model ship...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Gotta hurry!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Oh no!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What now?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: We haven't bought our meat yet!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Even the butcher will soon run away!

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
